name: Tushar Jain
tagline: Backend-focused Software Developer with full-stack experience, building scalable services, optimizing performance, and leveraging AI/ML.
about:
A Bachelor of Technology candidate in Electronics and Communication Engineering with a strong foundation in Data Structures, Algorithms, and Object-Oriented Programming. Experienced in designing and developing scalable backend services using NestJS, Node.js, and Python, implementing CI/CD pipelines, and optimizing API performance. Proven ability to contribute to full-stack development, from architecting systems to enhancing user experiences, with a keen interest in AI/ML applications and robust system design.

For Adizen, we developed a foundational UI library, providing a consistent and professional design system for their For Trijog, I enhanced their platform by developing a Corporate HR Dashboard, a dedicated corporate employee booking
highlights: Architected and developed scalable backend services using NestJS, implementing modular architecture and well-defined REST APIs.
Built Python-based microservices for PDF processing and asynchronous workflows, enabling decoupled and scalable system design.
Established CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions, improving deployment reliability and system stability.
Optimized API performance and improved frontend-backend integration for better system efficiency.
Strengthened security protocols and rules of a chat messaging system, resulting in zero data breaches.
